item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I know it’s niche but I’m excited, could you pretend you’re excited for me too?
item.description:
BUT I GOT 8 GIANT MELONS!
I’m about to start fall and I’ll probably marathon it again. Join me in some mediocre old lady stardew content if you want. It gets lonely in the wee hours lol. How many giant pumpkins will I get????? https://www.twitch.tv/madamerainbowpants
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: It’s my 43rd Birthday!!!!
item.description: And I am in the best shape of my life. Consistency, not perfection, is they key. Thought I’d share because I am proud! #health_and_fitness #fitness

item.title: [Bottom Shelf Title]
item.description:
RIP pixels.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live! This week, our twitch account is being overrun by @CrimeBrulee and the Bottom Shelf Community degens while Frothy and I get wasted on the beach.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Some of my recent illustrations and doodles. June 2024
item.description: Thanks as always for all the amazing comments and upvotes! Making Most Viral on Imgur always has a special place in my heart. ? If you like my work and want to support my art you can subscribe my Patreon (https://www.patreon.com/simz) or gift a coffee on Ko-fi (https://ko-fi.com/simzart). Any support helps me to stay an independant artist. Thank you!

item.title: When you're sad, watch this for 0.06 seconds
item.description: I find it better than Zoloft (yes 8 yrs experience). Just trying to help you smile or crack a mental smirk even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Annabelle Jenkins is a badass
item.description:
I love the bravery this girl has shown! Hopefully she'll inspire other young women to stand up to the hyper misogynistic bullshit of today. Here's a link to the story https://people.com/idaho-graduate-gives-superintendent-copy-of-the-handmaid-s-tale-after-book-censorship-8656592 Be sure to vote in the coming elections! The hard right are paving the road to a real life handmaid's tale as your reading this. It can get much much worse for us as women so speak up when you can. Bravo Annabelle, you rock!
Maisy tax, just chillin' with ducky baby Edit: Holy shit, yayyyy for the front page! Today happens to be my birthday even so that's fun. Thanks for updoots my fellow imgurians!
item.dc:creator: PrincessPuffyPants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1230 (Dune 3)
item.description:
This is gonna be my last Dune themed dump. As you may know and remember, or perhaps, as you have foreseen, Sundays are Theme-Dump days. Whoever controls the bread, controls the universe! (It was either that or "May thy toast chip and shatter.")
Summarizing Dune either takes three hours or one sentence.
The top are depictions of Alexander III of Macedon and Darius III of Achaemenid Persia, from a floor mosaic in Pompeii.
Just Dune Messiah things.
One of the most amazing sequences in the film.
If you've read A Stranger in a Strange Land, you know.
I would LOVE this.
Maybe then I'll actually sleep through a whole night.
The actual poet.
PIPPIN TAX we know this is why yall are here Today's message from Pippin: "I love you. Pippin? Beep. Beep. [Predator clicking noises] "
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Some Internet, philosophy for you. All of these are limited by the fact that they’re in meme format, but all of them speak to me in some way. Enjoy and don’t overthink it.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Exercising and changing my diet
item.description: Medication change forced me to quit drinking soda (because it makes it taste bad), which was the ultimate excuse for me to finally start losing weight. I actually ended up cutting a lot of sugar from my diet and am portioning my meals a lot better than I used to. Soda just made me crave more. Goal weight is 210 lbs. Wish me luck! Edit: Wow! Thanks everyone for the support! Edit 2: Decided to answer a couple questions as well. I?m 6?1? tall. I drank about 5-6 cans of soda a day. What I?m doing along with cutting the soda is also cutting other sugar foods and junk foods from my diet (not eliminating them entirely, but also not slamming a pack of Oreos in 2 days). I?ve strictly been drinking water. Any drink that?s had any added sugar (besides coffee) has not tasted right to me so I?ve avoided it. Also joined a gym and exercising about 4 days a week. Gym environment motivates me and helps with my ADHD. Gets me out of the house. (originally posted by @sgtmajorcool on 2023-06-03 02:55:02)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.dc:creator: bubblegumfaerie

item.title: My heart is very full
item.description: I have a large family (5 brothers) and there’s a 21 year age gap between the oldest and youngest (same parents for all of us). We were at my grandfathers funeral and it was the first time all of us had been together in 4 years, afterwards we were just BSing and telling stories, it felt so good
item.dc:creator: kidfromOKwiththetuckfromMB

item.title: I found this little friend in a bush during my run.
item.description:
Pretty clean little kitty. No mama in sight. I think someone just dropped her off. No fleas and very clean.
UPDATE: Because we have a dog and we are traveling quite a bit, we can’t keep this princess ourselves but we did find a loving home for her. Thanks for all the sweet comments. Also: she was in some chaparral when I heard her. It was only a matter of time before a snake, hawk or coyote got to her. I’m glad I slept in before my run. Timing is everything, am I right? #cats #kitten
item.dc:creator: iscreamfantastic

item.title: Happy Pride from Pittsburgh!!
item.description: Pittsburgh’s Pride March is open to the community so anyone who wants can march in it. It’s so much fun :) Edit: Most viral! :D Send uhhhhhhh…. smutty lgbt memes???
